rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DARNELL EUGENE MERCHANT
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/19/16. A filed stamped courtesy paper copy of all electronically filed documents requiring Court review or action needed to have been delivered not later than 1:30 p.m. of the day following electronic filing [Local Rule 2.11T]. Filed stamped copy must be delivered to Room 202 no later than 3 court days prior to continued hearing date, along with a proposed order.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF MILLA GUELETA
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/19/16. This accounting begins on 4/30/15; however, Petitioner was appointed temporary conservator on 3/19/15. Prior to review of this accounting petition, a verified declaration will need to be filed by Petitioner indicating that there were no receipts into, or disbursements out of, the estate between 3/19/15 and 4/30/15. Otherwise, the petition will need to be amended so that the accounting begins on 3/19/15. E-mail to counsel regarding the above was sent on 10/5/16, which has not been responded to.
